title: spiraea nervosa
intro: Spiraea nervosa, also known as Hardhack or Nervosa, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Spiraea nervosa include reducing pain and inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use, or dried and used in herbal remedies such as salves and ointments.
